pricing.description: Choose the plan that grows with you

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Free, self-hosted, forever
community.description: The full Billariz source code, freely available. Deploy on your own infrastructure with no licensing cost.
community.note: Ideal for technical teams who want full control of their stack.

demo.title: Book a demo
demo.description: See Billariz in action and find the solution that fits your needs.

q1.question: What is the difference between Community and support plans?
q1.answer: The Community edition is the open source code under AGPL-3.0 — free, self-hosted, with no Uppli support. Support plans include managed hosting, SLA, regulatory maintenance and expert guidance from our teams.

q2.question: Can I use the Community edition in production?
q2.answer: Yes, without restriction. You are responsible for your infrastructure and maintenance. If you need support or a service guarantee, a paid plan is recommended.

q3.question: What does the AGPL-3.0 license imply?
q3.answer: Any modification to the code must be published under the same license. If you wish to integrate Billariz into a proprietary product without complying with the AGPL, please contact us for a commercial license.

hero.description: An all-in-one platform built for recurring service providers: energy, water, waste management, subscriptions and more.

features.1: B2B and B2C SaaS with usage-based, time-based or volume-based billing
features.2: Energy, water network and waste management operators
features.4: Public entities with contractual cycles or concessions

section3.description: How Billariz helps you automate, value and invoice effortlessly.

features.1: Smart contract and billing scope management
features.3: Automatic generation of single or grouped invoices (statements)
features.4: Compliance validation (thresholds, invoice line balances, etc.)

section4.h2: Identify the best solution for your needs
section4.description: Our experts guide you to analyze your requirements, configure your solution and ensure billing tailored to your business.

features.1: All-in-one platform — no need to juggle multiple tools
features.4: Customizable business workflow, with zero lines of code
features.5: Open APIs for easy integration with your existing systems
features.6: Scalable and cloud-native to support your growth

section5.description: Everything you need to automate your contractual processes, value your services and make your billing reliable — without complexity or scattered tools

1.content: A genuinely interesting product that scales well from small organizations to mid-sized ones. Billariz brings flexibility to utilities billing without unnecessary complexity. Definitely worth exploring.
1.title: Co-founder — Uppli SAS
Signed contract
1.description: Everything starts with a clear agreement. Billariz registers your contracts and automatically prepares the information needed to start billing without errors.

2.title: Setup
2.description: Based on pre-configured startup options, Billariz installs the Terms of Service (TOS) and Service Elements (SE) of the contract to tailor billing to your organisation and management rules.

3.title: Data collection
3.description: Data from your activity is automatically centralised, providing a reliable foundation for valuation and billing calculation.

4.title: Valuation
4.description: From the collected data, Billariz applies your pricing rules to accurately value each billable item.

5.title: Billing calculation
5.description: Billariz automatically calculates the amounts to bill, taking into account contractual rules, thresholds, flat fees and consumed units.

6.title: Invoice generation
6.description: Invoices are generated in a standard or custom format, ready to be sent to your clients or integrated into your accounting system.

7.title: Validation
7.description: A validation process lets you verify amounts, recipients and billing items before final submission.

8.title: Status update
8.description: Once invoices are validated, Billariz automatically updates statuses to ensure precise tracking of every step: calculated, validated, pending… You stay in full control.

usecases.description: Billariz adapts to the specific needs of each sector — configurable workflows, single or multi-site contracts, single or multi-energy.

energy.title: Energy
energy.description: Billing management for distribution operators and energy suppliers, with support for multi-site and multi-energy contracts.

water.title: Water
water.description: Contractual cycle management for water distribution networks, with volumetric management and subscription-based billing.

items.2: Management of concessions and public contracts

waste.title: Waste
waste.description: Automated billing for waste collection and processing operators, by tonnage or collection.

items.3: Grouped statements by site or client

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.description: Flexible platform for B2B and B2C SaaS with usage-based, time-based or volume-based billing and multi-tier service levels.

opensource.description: Billariz is released under the AGPL-3.0 licence. The source code is open, auditable and deployable by any organisation.

license.title: AGPL-3.0 Licence
license.description: The source code is free. Any modification must be redistributed under the same licence. A commercial licence is available for proprietary use.

deploy.title: Self-host
deploy.description: Install Billariz on your own infrastructure with Docker. Maintain full control over your data and environment.

contribute.title: Contribute
contribute.description: Report bugs, suggest features or submit pull requests directly on GitHub.

support.title: Commercial support
support.description: Uppli SAS offers professional services: integration, configuration, SLA support and custom development.

editor.description: Uppli SAS publishes and makes available to the public the website www.billariz.com, a presentation platform for the Billariz solution — an open source software for contract management, pricing and invoicing aimed at recurring service providers (energy, water, waste management, subscriptions).
editor.acceptance: Please read the following terms carefully before using this site. Use of Billariz.com constitutes acceptance of these terms. By accessing the site, any user agrees to comply with the rules set out below.

access.title: Site access
access.content: Billariz.com is a showcase website allowing users to discover the Billariz solution, consult the documentation, access pricing and contact the team. Uppli SAS strives to keep the site accessible at all times, without being bound by an obligation to achieve this. Interruptions may occur for maintenance, updates or for any technical reason. Uppli SAS shall not be held liable for the consequences of such interruptions for the user.

content.title: Site content
content.content_before: Information published on Billariz.com (features, pricing, documentation, guides) is provided for indicative purposes and may change without notice, particularly in connection with updates to the Billariz solution. Uppli SAS strives to keep this information accurate and up to date, but cannot guarantee its completeness at any given time. Any error or omission may be reported to

links.title: Hyperlinks
links.content: Billariz.com may contain links to external resources (GitHub documentation, partners, third-party tools). Uppli SAS exercises no control over these sites and accepts no liability for their content or the use made of them by the user.

law.title: Applicable law
law.content: These terms of use are governed by French law. Uppli SAS reserves the right to modify them at any time, in particular to comply with any new regulation or legislation or to improve the user experience. Users are invited to consult this page regularly to keep up to date with any changes.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.site_content: The Billariz.com website and all its elements — texts, visuals, logos, icons, data, structure — are the exclusive property of Uppli SAS, protected by French and international intellectual property law.

ip.license_after: licence. Any commercial use without prior agreement from Uppli SAS requires obtaining a commercial licence. Contact:
ip.reproduction: Any reproduction or representation of the Billariz.com website, in whole or in part, for commercial purposes, is strictly prohibited without prior written authorisation from Uppli SAS.

data.title: Personal Data
data.intro: Uppli SAS only collects and processes personal data when you voluntarily provide it through forms available on Billariz.com (contact form, demo request).
data.rgpd_before: Uppli SAS is committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with French Act No. 78-17 "Informatique et Libertés" and EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR). For further information, you may consult the CNIL website:

contact_form.title: Contact form and demo request
contact_form.content: When you complete the contact or demo request form, the following data is collected: first and last name, email address, company, job title and message content. This information is used solely to respond to your request and, with your consent, to send you communications about the Billariz solution. This processing is based on your consent.

storage.title: Storage and retention period
storage.content: Collected data is intended exclusively for Uppli SAS and is neither sold nor transferred to third parties. It is retained for as long as necessary to process your request or, if you have subscribed to our communications, until you unsubscribe. Uppli SAS implements appropriate technical and organisational security measures to protect your data.

rights.title: Rights of data subjects
rights.content_before: In accordance with applicable data protection laws, you have the right to access, rectify, delete and object to the processing of your personal data. To exercise these rights, please contact our Data Protection Officer (DPO):

cookies.title: Use of Cookies
cookies.intro: Billariz.com uses technical and analytical cookies to improve your browsing experience and measure site traffic. No personal data is transmitted for advertising purposes.
cookies.settings: You can configure your browser to accept or reject cookies. Instructions for the main browsers are as follows:
cookies.chrome: Menu → Settings → Privacy → Content settings → Cookies
cookies.warning: Refusing certain cookies may affect some features of the site. For any questions, please contact us via the contact form available on this site.

contribute.title: This page is open to contributions
contribute.description: Spotted a mistake or want to improve the documentation? All contributions are welcome.
